name: Press Paws: Idle Clicker
short_description: Press Paws is a casual, laid-back and cute Idle Clicker Game in Pixel Art style with mini-games.
detailed_description:
Press Paws is a casual, laid-back and cute Idle Clicker Game in Pixel Art style with mini-games, achievements and boss fights. Oh, and secrets. Lots of secrets. Earn as much happiness as you can in order to lead your Cat to freedom!

Features

  • Pat the Cat to generate happiness, then spend that to earn even more!
  • Help your Cat navigate the Game Board and open the locked door at the end.
  • Enjoy relaxing Music.
  • Earn happiness by fighting bosses through the mysterious Portals.
  • Unlock 30+ Achievements!
  • Try and decipher the hidden clues and puzzles to unlock various secrets, including new skins for your Cat.
  • Many Cat (and Dog) skins to unlock!
  • Yes, Dogs are included.

Combat

Enjoy Retro style combat against various enemies to earn additional happiness.

Puzzles

There are various secrets and puzzles littered throughout the game! Can you find them all? Whether you're an achievement hunter, completionist or just enjoy the odd puzzle every now and then - there will be something for you to enjoy!

Achievements

Plenty of Achievements to earn, featuring over 30 currently implemented and more to come!

So jump in and starting tapping your paws now!
